subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me abased before the majesty of Thy Lordship and humbled before the grandeur of Thy Divinity, prostrate before Thy might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی خاضعا لعزه ربوبیتک و خاشعا لعظمه الوهیتک متذللا الی جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
